case_title: PIZANO, JESSE O. JR. VS NORTHWEST AIRLINES, INC. (C/O CT CORPORATION)

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PIZANO, JESSE O. JR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORTHWEST AIRLINES, INC. (C/O CT CORPORATION) $774.18 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $806.18, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR AT PREVIOUS HEARING; PRESENT TODAY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $774.18 FILED BY PIZANO, JESSE O. JR. AS TO DEFENDANT NORTHWEST AIRLINES, INC. (C/O CT CORPORATION) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DEFT CONTINUANCE REQUEST FILED LESS THAN 10 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING DATE. $10 FEE PAID. TO BE SIGNED BY COMM.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-06-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-05-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR FURTHER PRESENTATION OF EVIDENCE; DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR.
CERT MAIL SENT TO CT CORP SYSTEMS AGENT FOR SERVICE NORTHWEST AIRLINES INC. RETURNED SIGNED
